_doc: Functional burden / selection efficacy payload for page10. Empty stub — page10 detects the empty payload and renders the 'data pending' fallback. Populate from the upstream pipeline (bcftools csq + snpEff + VESM + custom splice module — see SPEC_2026-05-12_functional_burden.md §6.5). Schema in §4 + §4.1: per_sample[] now carries hom/het deleterious-burden split (n_hom_deleterious_vesm / n_het_deleterious_vesm / n_hom_lof / n_het_lof / n_hom_missense_damaging / n_het_missense_damaging) plus diagnostic_class label (exposed_load / founder_homozygous / carrier_rich / baseline). Driven by the 4-class fish-classification framework in IDEA_2026-05-20_h_roh_page_integration.md §7.4.

cohort_summary._doc_class_counts: Counts of samples in each diagnostic_class. Populated upstream.
